verses.2: See now, I have opened my mouth.
verses.3: My words will utter the uprightness of my heart.
verses.4: The Spirit of God has made me,
verses.6: Behold, I am toward God even as you are.
verses.7: Behold, my terror will not make you afraid,
verses.8: “Surely you have spoken in my hearing,
verses.10: Behold, he finds occasions against me.
verses.11: He puts my feet in the stocks.
verses.12: “Behold, I will answer you. In this you are not just,
verses.13: Why do you strive against him,
verses.15: In a dream, in a vision of the night,
verses.16: then he opens the ears of men,
verses.17: that he may withdraw man from his purpose,
verses.18: He keeps back his soul from the pit,
verses.19: “He is chastened also with pain on his bed,
verses.20: so that his life abhors bread,
verses.21: His flesh is so consumed away that it can’t be seen.
verses.22: Yes, his soul draws near to the pit,
verses.23: “If there is beside him an angel,
verses.24: then God is gracious to him, and says,
verses.25: His flesh will be fresher than a child’s.
verses.26: He prays to God, and he is favorable to him,
verses.27: He sings before men, and says,
verses.28: He has redeemed my soul from going into the pit.
verses.30: to bring back his soul from the pit,
verses.31: Mark well, Job, and listen to me.
verses.32: If you have anything to say, answer me.
